title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Juspay South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Juspay South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Juspay South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Juspay South Asia Partners:
Juspay South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay South Asia Partners!
